schema.name: TZPID source truth generated from canonical equation master

identity.canonical_title: Spectral Decomposition and Bessel Eigenmodes: φ(x,t)

theory.canonical_statement: Expanding the field, \[ \phi(\mathbf{x},t) = \sum_{n,m} a_{n,m}(t)\, \phi_{n,m}(\mathbf{x}), \] yields independent stochastic equations for each mode amplitude: \[ \ddot a_{n,m} + \gamma \dot a_{n,m} + \omega_{n,m}^2 a_{n,m} = \eta_{n,m}(t), \quad \omega_{n,m}=c k_{n,m}, \] with \( \eta_{n,m} \) inherited from the noise projection.
theory.technical_interpretation: Spectral Decomposition and Bessel Eigenmodes: φ(x,t) is a series / summation, written φ(x,t) = ∑_n,m a_n,m(t) φ_n,m(x). It is expressed as a sum or series over modes or indices, superposing discrete contributions. It is built from n, m, a_n,m, x, defining φ(x,t). Within the Trawin Zero Point registry it serves as one element of the framework's mathematical narrative.

formation.note: Introduced in the derivation where yields independent stochastic equations for each mode amplitude: with inherited from the noise projection.
